displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army
synopsis: A choose-your-own-path adventure set during the Clone Wars. Rumor holds that Count Dooku is assembling a highly trained army to destroy the Jedi. As a Padawan apprenticed to Jedi Master Plo Koon, the reader is assigned to locate and destroy the training ground of Dooku's secret army. The search leads across several planets and into contact with a range of characters, forcing the reader to decide who can be trusted and whether the mission can be completed before betrayal ends it.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army
